title: Component and End-to-End RAG Evaluation · Behavior Case: Rag Human Outcome Evidence
summary: A team reports one LLM-judge score on generated answers, never measures retrieval, changes the evaluator prompt between runs, and has no human or safety review. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the human outcome evidence increment in layered RAG evaluation harness. Learners progress through prediction, explic…
objectives: Design blinded domain review and user studies that measure decision correctness, time, accessibility, trust calibration, and harm.
Version judge model, rubric, prompt, inputs, calibration, position tests, variance, cost, and human disagreement and never treat judge output as ground truth.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: rag-human-outcome-evidence — Design blinded domain review and user studies that measure decision correctness, time, accessibility, trust calibration, and harm.
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-end-to-end-evaluation-5
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-end-to-end-evaluation-5.
# Case 9036: a multilingual support escalation.
# Operating constraint: record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer.
def worked_rag_end_to_end_evaluation_5(retrieval_score: float = 0.82, faithfulness: float = 0.91, answer_relevance: float = 0.84, citation_precision: float = 0.95, safety_pass: bool = True, human_reviewed: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "corpusworked5",
        "query5dekrow",
        "tenant9036",
        "indexworked59036",
        "prompt5dekrow9036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    scores = (retrieval_score, faithfulness, answer_relevance, citation_precision)
    if any(score < 0.0 or score > 1.0 for score in scores):
        return False, 0.0, "metric-range"
    if min(scores) < 0.75:
        return False, min(scores), "weak-stage"
    if not safety_pass:
        return False, min(scores), "safety-failure"
    if not human_reviewed:
        return False, min(scores), "judge-only"
    aggregate = sum(scores) / len(scores)
    assert aggregate <= 1.0
    return True, round(aggregate, 4), "layered-evaluation"

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-human-outcome-evidence-tqfk8h
# Competency: rag-human-outcome-evidence.
# Case 3529: a regulated document deletion request.
# Operating constraint: keep every status keyboard reachable, announced, readable without color, and linked to structured source evidence.
# Changed case: replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall.
def evidence_rag_human_outcome_evidence_tqfk8h(retrieval_score: float = 0.82, faithfulness: float = 0.91, answer_relevance: float = 0.84, citation_precision: float = 0.95, safety_pass: bool = True, human_reviewed: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_tqfk8h = "tqfk8h-h8kfqt-3529"
    assert evidence_variant_tqfk8h
    evidence_axes_tqfk8h = (
        "corpustqfk8h",
        "queryh8kfqt",
        "tenant3529",
        "indextqfk8h3529",
        "prompth8kfqt3529",
        "evaluation3529tqfk8h",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_tqfk8h)) == 6
    scores = (retrieval_score, faithfulness, answer_relevance, citation_precision)
    if any(score < 0.0 or score > 1.0 for score in scores):
        return False, 0.0, "metric-range"
    if min(scores) < 0.75:
        return False, min(scores), "weak-stage"
    if not safety_pass:
        return False, min(scores), "safety-failure"
    if not human_reviewed:
        return False, min(scores), "judge-only"
    aggregate = sum(scores) / len(scores)
    assert aggregate <= 1.0
    return True, round(aggregate, 4), "layered-evaluation"
